global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a focus on gaming elements and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging players to engage with friends in a competitive game.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: GlitchWave logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo with the text 'GlitchWave' prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Four circular game icons arranged in a grid pattern, each with a simple design.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A large, bold text stating 'Beat your rivals' in a playful font.

elements.label: Subheadline
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline that reads 'Play with friends tonight' in a friendly font.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A rectangular button with rounded corners that says 'Claim reward' in bold text.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small circular icon that appears to be a decorative element, placed above the main content.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: Another small circular icon similar to the previous one, positioned below the main content.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small circular icon that serves as a decorative element, located near the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: The central text that conveys the main message, stating 'Beat your rivals Play with friends tonight' in a large, engaging font.
elements.text_content: Beat your rivals Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Game title
elements.description: The title 'GlitchWave' displayed prominently at the top of the ad in a vibrant color.

elements.label: Reward claim text
elements.description: A smaller text at the bottom of the ad that encourages users to 'Claim reward' in a clear, inviting font.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main headline and subheadline, with game icons in the center and the CTA at the bottom.
